title: Organic Genera
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Genus_Localised) FROM ScanOrganic WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND ScanType = 'Analyse' AND Genus_Localised IS NOT NULL
detailQuery: SELECT Genus_Localised AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ScanOrganic WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND ScanType = 'Analyse' AND Genus_Localised IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Genus_Localised ORDER BY value DESC
